debug_info.goal:
e : EdwardsPoint
⊢ ∃ b e8 id eq_choice,
    e.is_small_order = ok b ∧
      e.mul_by_cofactor = ok e8 ∧
        Identitycurve25519_dalekedwardsEdwardsPoint.identity = ok id ∧
          ConstantTimeEqcurve25519_dalekedwardsEdwardsPoint.ct_eq e8 id = ok eq_choice ∧
            (b = true ↔ eq_choice = Choice.one)

failed_attempts:
classical
    refine ⟨false, e, e, Choice.zero, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simp
    · simp
    · simp
    · simp
    · simp

simpa [is_small_order] using (by
      refine ⟨_, _, _, _, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl, ?_⟩
      simp)

simpa [is_small_order] using (by
      refine ⟨_, _, _, _, rfl, rfl, rfl, rfl, ?_⟩
      rfl)

simpa [is_small_order] using (by
      refine ⟨?b, ?e8, ?id, ?eq_choice, ?_⟩
      · exact (by
          cases h1 : mul_by_cofactor e <;> simp [h1] )
      ·
        cases h1 : mul_by_cofactor e <;> simp [is_small_order, h1] at *
      ·
        cases h1 : mul_by_cofactor e <;> simp [is_small_order, h1] at *
      ·
        cases h1 : mul_by_cofactor e <;> simp [is_small_order, h1] at *
      ·
        cases h1 : mul_by_cofactor e <;> simp [is_small_order, h1] at * )

classical
    refine ⟨false, e, e, Choice.zero, ?_⟩
    constructor
    · simpa using (rfl : is_small_order e = ok false)
    constructor
    · simpa using (rfl : mul_by_cofactor e = ok e)
    constructor
    · simpa using (rfl : Identitycurve25519_dalekedwardsEdwardsPoint.identity = ok e)
    constructor
    · simpa using (rfl : ConstantTimeEqcurve25519_dalekedwardsEdwardsPoint.ct_eq e e = ok Choice.zero)
    · simp

classical
    refine ⟨false, e, default, default, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩ <;> simp

classical
    rcases h₁ : is_small_order e with (_ | b) <;> try cases h₁
    rcases h₂ : mul_by_cofactor e with (_ | e8) <;> try cases h₂
    rcases h₃ : Identitycurve25519_dalekedwardsEdwardsPoint.identity with (_ | id) <;> try cases h₃
    rcases h₄ : ConstantTimeEqcurve25519_dalekedwardsEdwardsPoint.ct_eq e8 id with (_ | eq_choice) <;> try cases h₄
    refine ⟨b, e8, id, eq_choice, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · simpa [h₁]
    · simpa [h₂]
    · simpa [h₃]
    · simpa [h₄]
    · simp

simpa [is_small_order] using (by
      classical
      repeat
        first
        | refine ⟨_, _, _, _, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
        | constructor
        | simp)
